### Before you mark this ready

- [ ] **Blog seed dropped.** Add one file under [`notes/blog-seeds/`](../notes/blog-seeds/) drawn from what this PR touched — a concrete hook + the source PR/branch + the trade-off/why/gotcha worth a post. It's a lightweight capture, not a commitment to publish; don't wait for a yes. Format: [`notes/blog-seeds/README.md`](../notes/blog-seeds/README.md). _(Skip only for pure dependency bumps / mechanical chores with no story.)_
- [ ] Ran `pnpm check` (or explained why not).
